title: Pungent Hunan Mein
description: A spicy and savory stir-fry dish made with pungent lo mein noodles, hunan peppers, and chinese vegetables.
instructions: Cook Lo Mein Noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add Hunan peppers and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add pungent vegetables and cook until tender.
Add Chinese garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add cooked Pinto Beans and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add cooked Lo Mein Noodles and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, rice vinegar, and Hunan spice.
Pour sauce over noodles and vegetables and stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes.
